scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "${npm_config_user_agent:-pnpm/ci}" in pnpm/*) ;; *) test -n "${STACK}${CI}" || { echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1; } ;; esac'
scripts.heroku-postbuild: echo 'Pre-built dist files included in repo — skipping build step'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --filter='!@workspace/mockup-sandbox' --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
